economic_notes: Nation owns 99.99% of Amik Logging Limited Partnership which owns 51% of Amik Nuna Forestry Services Joint Venture. Nation holds minority interests in Ontario First Nations Sovereign Wealth LP, OFN Asset Management GP Corp, Matawa Development GP Inc, NE-DAA-KII-ME-NAAN Inc, Landmark Inn Limited Partnership, and Shekak Power generating facility. Receives gaming revenue distributions from Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership (OFNLP) representing 1.7% of provincial gross gaming revenues.
notes: Fiscal year ends March 31, 2023. Consolidated entity includes Constance Lake First Nation Band and Constance Lake Education Authority. Two GBEs (Amik Logging LP and 2500845 Ontario Inc.) accounted for under modified equity method. Nation adopted PS 3450 Financial Instruments and PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations effective April 1, 2022. Large portfolio investments of $30.8M including GICs acquired during year. Deferred revenue balance of $16.3M is significant relative to operations. Tangible capital assets net book value not extractable from text provided. Accounts receivable not separately stated from balance sheet in text provided. ISC funding calculated as Fixed + Grant + Flexible + Set + FNIHB lines. CMHC and Province of Ontario included in total government transfers.
